openFindings.title: Actual skill diff is larger than the packet's 18-file release claim
evidence: command: git diff --name-only 3c170c46de -- .opencode/skills returned 21 tracked files; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard .opencode/skills returned 9 untracked files
openFindings.fix: Reconcile the packet scope with the real diff/status surface, or move unrelated changes out before making release claims.

openFindings.title: Mandatory sk-doc validation fails on three modified reference docs
evidence: command: python3 .opencode/skills/sk-doc/scripts/validate_document.py failed with missing_required_section overview on those three files
openFindings.fix: Add required overview sections or remove those files from the release surface; then rerun validate_document.py on every changed Markdown file.

openFindings.title: Shared contract has non-resolving bare path citations
openFindings.fix: Replace bare filenames with explicit relative paths such as ../design-audit/references/audit_contract.md and ../design-audit/assets/audit_evidence_worksheet.md.

openFindings.title: Four-miss closure remains advisory in the executable routers
openFindings.fix: Add the shared contract/cards/worksheet to the relevant DEFAULT_RESOURCE or RESOURCE_MAP entries, or add an executable pre-dispatch check that fails when the proof fields are absent.

openFindings.title: MiniMax manual scenario weakens path-guard posture and contradicts model profile guidance
openFindings.fix: Remove --dangerously-skip-permissions from the scenario, omit --variant for MiniMax unless the accepted behavior is verified, and keep the no---agent rule.

openFindings.title: Template 16 leaves stale template-count language and is appended after related resources
openFindings.fix: Move Template 16 before related resources and update the inventory scenario/count language so CO-023 does not conflict with the template file.
